Class JsonOld

java.lang.Object
com.github.yellowstonegames.store.old.JsonOld
public final class JsonOld extends Object

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    registerAll(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
    Registers SquidOld's classes with the given Json object, allowing it to read and write SquidOld types.
    static void
    registerCrossHashCurlup(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
    Registers CrossHash.Curlup with the given Json object, so CrossHash.Curlup can be written to and read from JSON.
    static void
    registerCrossHashMist(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
    Registers CrossHash.Mist with the given Json object, so CrossHash.Mist can be written to and read from JSON.
    static void
    registerCrossHashYolk(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
    Registers CrossHash.Yolk with the given Json object, so CrossHash.Yolk can be written to and read from JSON.
    static void

    Registers DiverRNG with the given Json object, so DiverRNG can be written to and read from JSON.
    static void
    registerGWTRNG(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
    Registers GWTRNG with the given Json object, so GWTRNG can be written to and read from JSON.
    static void

    Registers LightRNG with the given Json object, so LightRNG can be written to and read from JSON.

    Registers SilkRNG with the given Json object, so SilkRNG can be written to and read from JSON.

    Registers ThrustAltRNG with the given Json object, so ThrustAltRNG can be written to and read from JSON.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • registerAll

      public static void registerAll(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
      Registers SquidOld's classes with the given Json object, allowing it to read and write SquidOld types.
      Parameters:
      json - a libGDX Json object that will have serializers registered for all SquidOld types.

    • registerLightRNG

      public static void registerLightRNG(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
      Registers LightRNG with the given Json object, so LightRNG can be written to and read from JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - a libGDX Json object that will have a serializer registered

    • registerDiverRNG

      public static void registerDiverRNG(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Json json)
      Registers DiverRNG with the given Json object, so DiverRNG can be written to and read from JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - a libGDX Json object that will have a serializer registered

      Registers GWTRNG with the given Json object, so GWTRNG can be written to and read from JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - a libGDX Json object that will have a serializer registered
